stories.title: Phase 1: Foundation — Config & Constants
acceptanceCriteria: backend/constants.py exists with CTF_ADDRESS, USDC_E_ADDRESS, USDC_NATIVE_ADDRESS, PUSD_ADDRESS, CHAIN_IDS, ZERO_ADDRESS
backend/fee_config.py exists with TAKER_FEE_RATE=0.01, KALSHI_TAKER_FEE_RATE=0.07, FEE_USE_STORED=True
config.py has no duplicate fields (AUTO_REDEEM_INTERVAL_SECONDS appears once)
57 missing env vars added to ConfigRegistry
pytest tests/ passes with 0 new failures

stories.title: Phase 2: PnL Unification
acceptanceCriteria: calculate_pnl() uses fee_config values, no hardcoded fee_bps
BTC 5-min settlement calls calculate_pnl() (no inline formula in settlement.py:84-108)
Bankroll update has no '- fee' term (settlement.py:825)
genome_repository.py calls calculate_pnl() (no inline formula at lines 249-274)
shadow_runner.py calls calculate_pnl() (no inline formula at lines 118-134)
pytest tests/ passes with 0 new failures

stories.title: Phase 3: Wire Wallet System
acceptanceCriteria: WalletRouter instantiated in backend/api/lifespan.py at startup
WalletMatrix.tsx fetches strategies from API (not hardcoded list)

stories.title: Phase 5: Wire Strategies
acceptanceCriteria: Scheduler iterates StrategyConfig from DB (no hardcoded strategy names)
All enabled strategies execute in each cycle
pytest tests/ passes with 0 new failures

stories.title: Phase 6: Consolidate Duplicates
acceptanceCriteria: 0 duplicate module pairs remain (29 pairs consolidated)
All imports use canonical paths (subdirectory versions)
pytest tests/ passes with 0 new failures

stories.title: Phase 7: Frontend Wiring
acceptanceCriteria: 8 orphaned components imported in Dashboard/Admin tabs
16 dead pages either routed in App.tsx or removed

stories.title: Phase 8: Verification
acceptanceCriteria: grep -rn '0.02' backend/config.py returns 0 fee rate matches
All providers register (7: aster, hyperliquid, kalshi, lighter, ostium, paper, polymarket)
